title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue - Allow Once option is selected
scenario: After selecting "Allow Once" on iOS location permission dialogue, the app should re-prompt for location consent upon restart.
steps: Start app for first time and finish onboarding → Home Screen shows location dialogue with options 'Allow Once', 'Allow While Using App', 'Don't Allow'.
Tap 'Allow Once', then navigate to App Settings → Find My Device → FMD screen is visible without location dialogue.
Restart the app → User should be prompted again for location consent on the Home Screen.
expected: After restarting the app, the user should be prompted again for location consent on the Home Screen.
